display.purpose: Hero headline only — Cormorant Garamond, capped at 6rem.

body.purpose: Descriptions and form text — Inter, 65–75ch measure.

label.purpose: Uppercase CTA microcopy only — Inter, tracked.

arabic.purpose: Cairo replaces the entire stack when lang=ar.

shadows.name: gold-glow
shadows.purpose: Signature accent glow on primary CTAs — accent elements cast their own color.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: Cart drawer, mobile menu, modals — highest tier.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default reveal/entrance easing for content (fade + rise).

motion.name: ease-overshoot
motion.purpose: Nav-link underline scale-in — a gentle gilt overshoot.

motion.name: spring-morph
motion.purpose: Hero search pill morph between button and glass field.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Pill CTA — champagne gold ground, navy label, gold glow. The single accent action on a screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #E8C547; color: #14213D; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 14px 40px; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px hsla(47,81%,60%,0.2); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #F0B429; box-shadow: 0 14px 22px hsla(47,81%,60%,0.32); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8C547; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost pill — transparent ground, gold border + gold label, fills gold at 5% on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #E8C547; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; padding: 12px 24px; border: 2px solid #E8C547; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.15s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: rgba(232,197,71,0.05); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #E8C547; outline-offset: 3px; } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Transparent field, navy 30% border, 12px radius; on focus the border vanishes and a gold ring becomes the edge.
components.html: <input class="ds-input-field" type="text" placeholder="Search for furniture, styles, and more..." />
components.css: .ds-input-field { width: 100%; background: transparent; color: #1A202C; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; padding: 12px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(20,33,61,0.3); border-radius: 12px; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-input-field::placeholder { color: #4A5568; } .ds-input-field:focus { border-color: transparent; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #E8C547; }

components.name: Category Card
components.description: Image mounted on a midnight-navy ground at 4:5, 24px corners; flat at rest, lifts on hover. Title sits below the frame.
components.html: Living Room
components.css: .ds-card-category { display: flex; flex-direction: column; text-align: center; text-decoration: none; } .ds-card-frame { position: relative; background: #14213D; border-radius: 24px; overflow: hidden; aspect-ratio: 4/5; transition: box-shadow 0.3s; } .ds-card-category:hover .ds-card-frame { box-shadow: 0 20px 25px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); } .ds-card-img { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .ds-card-overlay { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.1); transition: background 0.3s; } .ds-card-category:hover .ds-card-overlay { background: transparent; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #1A202C; margin-top: 16px; }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Cormorant serif link; hover shifts to gold and draws a gold underline that scales in from center on a gentle overshoot.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { position: relative; font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #1A202C; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 4px; transition: color 0.3s; } .ds-nav-link::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; bottom: 0; width: 100%; height: 2px; background: #E8C547; border-radius: 99px; transform: scaleX(0); transform-origin: center; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.175,0.885,0.32,1.275); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #E8C547; } .ds-nav-link:hover::after { transform: scaleX(1); }

narrative.overview: Raafat Furniture is a craftsman's studio rendered as an interface — warm, considered, and quietly opulent. Champagne gold appears the way gilt appears on dark wood: as a deliberate detail, never a coating. Midnight navy is the velvet the pieces rest against; the furniture photography is the hero, and the chrome steps back to frame it. The system is bilingual to the bone (English LTR and Arabic RTL) and dual-themed (a bright daylight showroom and a candlelit evening room), and each variant is first-class. Modern materials — backdrop blur, spring motion, a slow theme cross-dissolve — are present but earned. Restraint reads as the luxury; gold is punctuation. It rejects trendy AI-SaaS slop, generic IKEA/big-box density, and cold sterile minimalism alike.
keyCharacteristics: Champagne gold + midnight navy on a white (day) or charcoal (night) ground.
Cormorant Garamond serif display over Inter body; Cairo carries Arabic in both roles.
Soft rounded-luxe geometry: pill CTAs, 24px cards, 12px inputs.
Spring-based, exponential-ease motion; signature shine sweep and morphing search pill.
Full EN/AR + light/dark parity, WCAG AA floor.

rules.name: The Gilt Rule
rules.body: Champagne gold covers ≤10% of any screen — gilt on dark wood, a detail or a single CTA, never a background fill. The rarity is the luxury.

rules.name: The Ink-on-Gold Rule
rules.body: Text on a gold surface is midnight navy or near-black ink, never white. White on champagne gold lands near 1.6:1 and fails AA; navy-on-gold clears it and reads richer.

rules.name: The Constant-Navy Rule
rules.body: Midnight navy never flips between themes. White and ink swap day-for-night; navy stays, so the brand reads continuously across both modes.

rules.name: The Serif-Voice Rule
rules.body: Cormorant carries voice (hero, headings, nav, toggles); Inter carries function (body, inputs, prices, fine print). Never set a paragraph in Cormorant or a heading in Inter.

rules.name: The One-Family-Arabic Rule
rules.body: When lang=ar, Cairo replaces the entire stack — no Cormorant, no Inter. Arabic gets its own coherent voice.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow is a state (hover, focus, elevation), not a decoration.

rules.name: The Colored-Glow Rule
rules.body: Accent elements cast accent-colored shadows (gold at ~20% alpha); structural surfaces cast neutral black. Don't mix them.

rules.name: The Purposeful-Glass Rule
rules.body: Glass (backdrop-blur) is for floating layers only — header, search pill, auth panel. Forbidden as decorative card filler.

dos: Do keep champagne gold to ≤10% of any screen — gilt on dark wood, never a wash.
Do set text on gold in midnight navy / ink, never white.
Do let the furniture photography be the hero; chrome recedes behind it.
Do use Cormorant for voice and Inter for function.
Do swap the entire type stack to Cairo when lang=ar, and mirror padding with logical properties (ps-/pe-).
Do keep navy constant across light and dark; only white/ink flip.
Do cast gold-tinted glows on accent elements and neutral shadows on structural ones.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion: reduce fallback.
Do verify body text ≥4.5:1 and large text ≥3:1 in both themes before shipping.
donts: Don't ship trendy AI-SaaS slop: cream/beige bodies, tracked-uppercase eyebrows over every section, identical icon-heading-text card grids, gradient text.
Don't drift into generic IKEA / big-box: cluttered product walls, loud sale banners, warehouse density.
Don't go cold, sterile, all-white gallery-empty — this is a warm home for furniture.
Don't use glass as decorative card filler; reserve it for floating layers.
Don't put white text on champagne gold, anywhere.
Don't set body copy in Cormorant or headings in Inter.
Don't use a colored side-stripe border (border-left > 1px) as an accent.
Don't leave shadows on at-rest surfaces for decoration — a shadow is a state.
Don't over-gild: heavy gold everywhere, gold gradients, gold-on-gold read as gaudy.
